recommendations.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
recommendations.overview: Powered with incredible speed, Sonic The Hedgehog embraces his new home on Earth. That is, until Sonic sparks the attention of super-uncool evil genius Dr. Robotnik. Now it’s super-villain vs. super-sonic in an all-out race across the globe to stop R

recommendations.title: Freaks Out
recommendations.overview: Four super-powered circus freaks find themselves trapped in war-torn Rome after their foster father is captured by the Nazis.

recommendations.title: Parasyte: Part 2
recommendations.overview: Humanity is under attack by human-mimicking flesh-eating alien parasites. One parasite bonds with his young high school student host, and he convinces the parasite to help him stop the others.

recommendations.title: The Witcher: Sirens of the Deep
recommendations.overview: When human sailors are attacked by mysterious creatures of the deep, only one person can stop the war between land and sea: the Witcher, Geralt of Rivia.

recommendations.title: Rape Zombie: Lust of the Dead
recommendations.overview: After a nuclear attack in Tokyo, the female population is attacked by infected males who have become sex-crazed zombies, hungry for human flesh. Officeworker Momoko and nurse Nozomi seek shelter in a Shinto Shrine, where they meet housewife Kanae and

recommendations.title: Breathless
recommendations.overview: Jesse, a small-time criminal, high-tails it to Los Angeles to rendezvous with a French exchange student. Stealing a car and accidentally killing a highway patrolman, he becomes the most wanted fugitive in L.A.

recommendations.title: The Enigma of Kaspar Hauser
recommendations.overview: The film follows Kaspar Hauser, who lived the first seventeen years of his life chained in a tiny cellar with only a toy horse to occupy his time, devoid of all human contact except for a man who wears a black overcoat and top hat who feeds him.

recommendations.title: Ad Vitam
recommendations.overview: When he and his pregnant wife are attacked in their home, a former elite agent becomes trapped in a deadly manhunt tied to his own painful past.

recommendations.title: The Stunt Man
recommendations.overview: A fugitive stumbles onto a movie set just when they need a new stunt man, takes the job as a way to hide out and falls for the leading lady while facing off with his manipulative director.

recommendations.title: Until the End of the World
recommendations.overview: In 1999, a woman's life is forever changed after she survives a car crash with two bank robbers, who enlist her help to take the money to a drop in Paris. On the way, she runs into another fugitive from the law — an American doctor on the run from th
